entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., an economically important crop grown by smallholder farmers in Ethiopia

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the study on chickpea moisture stress was conducted

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: Water deficiency that can be detrimental during flowering and grain filling stages

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the crop, used as a proxy parameter for screening drought tolerance

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Drought stress occurring at the end of the growing season in rainfed systems

entities.name: RAINFED PRODUCTION SYSTEM
entities.description: A farming system that relies solely on rainfall for moisture

entities.name: FIELD-SCREENING METHOD
entities.description: A practical field-level approach used to identify drought tolerance traits in breeding programs

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a cultivar to maintain yield under moisture stress conditions

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Standard breeding practices used to develop improved crop varieties

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A study using elite cultivars to evaluate responses to varying moisture regimes

entities.name: MOISTURE REGIMES
entities.description: Different levels of water availability, including mild and severe drought intensities

entities.name: KABULI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A type of chickpea cultivar found to be more sensitive to moisture stress

entities.name: DESI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A type of chickpea cultivar found to be more tolerant to moisture stress than kabuli types

entities.name: SEVERE DROUGHT
entities.description: A high-intensity moisture stress condition causing yield penalties exceeding 70%

entities.name: IRRIGATED TREATMENT
entities.description: A control condition where water is provided to the crop

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of additional water during pod setting to grain filling stages to increase yield

entities.name: SHORTER DURATION
entities.description: A trait of cultivars that allows them to mature faster to avoid drought losses

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of cultivars to withstand or recover from drought-caused yield losses
